name: konopos
description: TouDev — POS local pour restaurants et cafés

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @konopos/api" "npm run dev -w @konopos/web"
scripts.start:web:prod: npm run build -w @konopos/web && npm run preview -w @konopos/web
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build -w @konopos/web && npm run dist:win -w @konopos/electron-desktop
scripts.publish:desktop: npm run build -w @konopos/web && npm run publish:win -w @konopos/electron-desktop
